children.name: Guillaume I de Mello Seigneur de St Bris

zh.lifeSummary: 當Dreux IV de Mello於大約1110年出生時，他的父親Dreux III de Mello2歲，母親Basille de Beauvais2歲。他和Ermengarde de SAINT-BRIS至少有1個兒子。他於1193年在美國伊利諾州被列為croisé en 1190, connétable de france。他去世於1153年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dreux IV de Mello于大约1110年出生时，他的父亲Dreux III de Mello2岁，母亲Basille de Beauvais2岁。他和Ermengarde de SAINT-BRIS至少有1个儿子。他于1193年在美国伊利诺伊州被列为croisé en 1190, connétable de france。他去世于1153年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mello
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Adelino, Ana, Joaquin, Acacio, Claudio, Cristina, Fernando, Americo, Enrique.  Portuguese Duarte, Joaquim, Armanda, Joao, Paulo, Serafim.
Italian: probably from a short form of a personal name ending with the hypocoristic suffix -ello, such as Giacomello from Giacomo .

variants.name: Giacomo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenico, Gino, Salvatore.
Italian: from the personal name Giacomo, from Latin Jacobus via Late Latin Jacomus (see James and Jacob ).

variants.name: Melle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Horst, Kurt, Otto.
Italian: habitational name from Melle in Cuneo province (Piedmont); in some cases possibly also a variant of a personal name such as   Mello   1.
Norwegian: probably a variant of   Mele  .

variants.name: Mellone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Emidio, Luigi, Pasquale.
Italian: from an augmentative of   Mello  .

nameMeanings.name: Dreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Druce
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, now used as a given name throughout the English-speaking world. In the 20th century it was particularly popular in Australia. The surname was originally a Norman baronial name, but a precise identification of the place from which it was derived has not been made (there are a large number of possible candidates). The Bruces were an influential Norman family in Scottish affairs in the early Middle Ages; its most famous member was  Robert  ‘the Bruce’ (  1274–1329 ), who is said to have drawn inspiration after his defeat at Methven from the perseverance of a spider in repeatedly climbing up again after being knocked down. He ruled Scotland as  King Robert I  from  1306 to 1329 .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

en.lifeSummary: When Dreux IV de Mello was born about 1110, his father, Dreux III de Mello, was 2 and his mother, Basille de Beauvais, was 2. He had at least 1 son with Ermengarde de SAINT-BRIS. In 1193, his occupation is listed as croisé en 1190, connétable de france in Illinois, United States. He died after 1153.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dreux IV de Mello est né environ 1110, son père, Dreux III de Mello, avait 2 ans et sa mère, Basille de Beauvais, avait 2 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Ermengarde de SAINT-BRIS. En 1193, sa profession de son indiquée est croisé en 1190, connétable de france à Illinois, États-Unis. Il est décédé après 1153.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dreux IV de Mello um 1110 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dreux III de Mello 2 und seine Mutter Basille de Beauvais 2. Er hatte mit Ermengarde de SAINT-BRIS mindestens 1 Sohn. 1193 ist sein Beruf als croisé en 1190, connétable de france in Illinois, Vereinigte Staaten aufgeführt. Er starb nach 1153.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dreux IV de Mello è nato il circa 1110, il suo padre, Dreux III de Mello, aveva 2 anni e il suo madre, Basille de Beauvais, aveva 2 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Ermengarde de SAINT-BRIS. Nel 1193, la sua occupazione è indicata come croisé en 1190, connétable de france nel Illinois, Stati Uniti d'America. Morì dopo il 1153.

ja.lifeSummary: Dreux IV de Melloが約1110年に生まれた時，父Dreux III de Melloは2歳，母Basille de Beauvaisは2歳であった。彼はErmengarde de SAINT-BRISとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。1193年，アメリカ合衆国イリノイ州での職業はcroisé en 1190, connétable de franceと記録されている。彼は1153年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dreux IV de Mello(이)가 대략 1110년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dreux III de Mello(은)는 2세였고, 그의 어머니 Basille de Beauvais(은)는 2세였다. 그는 Ermengarde de SAINT-BRIS(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1193년, 그의 직업은 미국 일리노이 주에서 croisé en 1190, connétable de france이었다. 그는 1153년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dreux IV de Mello nasceu aproximadamente 1110, seu pai, Dreux III de Mello, tinha 2 anos e sua mãe, Basille de Beauvais, tinha 2 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Ermengarde de SAINT-BRIS. Em 1193, sua profissão aparece como croisé en 1190, connétable de france em Ilinóis, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu após 1153.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dreux IV de Mello родился около 1110 г., его отцу по имени Dreux III de Mello было 2 года, а матери, которую звали Basille de Beauvais, 2. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Ermengarde de SAINT-BRIS. В 1193 году он работал по профессии croisé en 1190, connétable de france в местности Иллинойс, Соединенные штаты. Он умер после 1153 г.

sm.about 1110–after 1153: e tusa o le 1110–ina ua ma'ea le 1153

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dreux IV de Mello nació aproximadamente 1110, su papá, Dreux III de Mello, tenía 2 años y su mamá, Basille de Beauvais, tenía 2 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Ermengarde de SAINT-BRIS. En 1193, su ocupación registrada era croisé en 1190, connétable de france en Illinois, Estados Unidos. Murió después de 1153.

th.about 1110–after 1153: ประมาณปี 1110–หลังปี 1153
th.1110–Female: ปี1110–ถึงแก่กรรม
